arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes feelings crystal clear on Liverpool situation: 'I don't care'
arts.sum: Liverpool beat West Ham United 2-1 at Anfield on Sunday afternoon to extend their lead at the top of the table and put Arne Slot closer to the title in his debut season at Anfield

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reacts to new Virgil van Dijk contract comment
arts.sum: Arne Slot's press conference inevitably focused on Virgil van Dijk after his dramatic winner for Liverpool against West Ham.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reaches impressive milestone as Liverpool close in on title with late West Ham win
arts.sum: Liverpool left it late to secure a 2-1 win over West Ham at Anfield on Sunday thanks a late goal from Virgil van Dijk after Andy Robertson's own goal cancelled out Luis Diaz's opener

arts.ttl: Why Andy Robertson was 'furious' with Virgil van Dijk minutes before dramatic Liverpool winner
arts.sum: Liverpool moved one step closer to the Premier League title with a late win over West Ham United

arts.ttl: Graham Potter praises West Ham's performance despite 2-1 Liverpool loss
arts.sum: Potter lauds West Ham's effort, highlighting second-half surge and missed chances. He credits Liverpool's intensity, noting the challenge of controlling the ball, and praises Kudus.

arts.ttl: ‘Closer to our dreams’: Virgil van Dijk proud as Liverpool move 13 points clear
arts.sum: ‘It was emotional because of Hillsborough anniversary’ Slot says focus is on getting two more wins, not contracts Arne Slot said Liverpool’s only focus is on securing the two wins needed to secure the Premier League title after Virgil van Dijk indicated his contract saga could be resolved this week. The Dutchman gave Liverpool a fortunate victory over West Ham with an 89th-minute header and celebrated by kissing the badge on his shirt in front of the Kop. The captain’s goal means Liverpool require only six points from the remaining six games to seal the championship. Continue reading...
